_meta.track: Track B Run 3 — 3 static hero (о компании, как мы работаем, гарантии)
_meta.art_consistency: object-focused still-life, NO humans/figures/silhouettes (Run 1+2 unified rule, Stage 0 R1)

iterations.static-o-kompanii-hero: 1 (PASS; клипборд + перчатки + куртка + термос + рулетка на дощатом столе с домом-сруб в фоне, БЕЗ людей; minor §14: на клипборде псевдо-«SERVICES» — latin glyph, в рамках допустимого)
iterations.static-kak-my-rabotaem-hero: 1 (PASS; flat-lay смартфон с фото частного дома + распечатанный документ с абстрактными glyphs + ручка, БЕЗ людей; чистая narrative «фото→смета»)
iterations.static-garantii-hero: 1 (PASS; договор с круглой печатью + ручка + куртка на walnut столе, БЕЗ людей; minor §14: на печати latin pseudo-glyphs «ESTRTACT/STAGE» — borderline text-fakery, оставлен)

params.visualConcept: wide overhead still-life on a worn wooden outdoor table set in a Moscow Region suburban property: a folded clipboard with abstract horizontal lines suggesting a service checklist, leather-palm work gloves laid neatly next to it, a folded blue branded uniform jacket on the right side of the table, a small thermos and a metal measuring tape, in the soft-blurred background — a private wooden house with a pitched roof and mature trees, neutral mid-day daylight, calm matter-of-fact composition

items.alt: Инструменты бригады Обихода на столе на фоне подмосковного участка — клипборд, перчатки, фирменная форма

params.visualConcept: minimal overhead still-life on a clean light beige wooden office table: a modern smartphone lying flat on the left with its screen out of focus and showing a faint photo of a private suburban property, next to it a printed sheet of paper with abstract horizontal lines and number-like glyphs (no actual readable letters or numbers — only abstract document shapes), a slim black ballpoint pen between them, soft natural daylight from the right, muted warm palette

items.alt: Смартфон с фото объекта и распечатанная смета на офисном столе — как Обиход считает работу

params.visualConcept: overhead still-life on a dark walnut wooden table indoors: a printed contract document with a circular ink stamp impression and abstract horizontal lines suggesting clauses (no readable letters, only abstract document shapes and blurred glyphs), a black classic fountain pen resting on it, a folded blue branded work uniform jacket on the corner of the table, soft mid-day daylight from a window on the left, calm formal-warm tone, real wood and paper textures

items.alt: Договор с печатью, ручка и фирменная форма на деревянном столе — гарантии Обихода
